acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_craft_001] PASS if the revised material between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:245, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:477, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:541 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:547 gives each major turn no more than one paragraph of abstract interpretation and ends at least one turn on a concrete consequence rather than a thesis sentence about what Eli means. FAIL if multiple consecutive interpretive paragraphs still arrive after the live beat has already dramatized the shift.

[FA-003] Pass if the moment at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:678 still lands through this single earned hesitation beat and the immediate exchange does not add a second similar 'almost' construction. Fail if the line is flattened into generic reluctance or multiplied into a repeated tic nearby.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised material between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:245, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:477, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:541 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:547 gives each major turn no more than one paragraph of abstract interpretation and ends at least one turn on a concrete consequence rather than a thesis sentence about what Eli means. FAIL if multiple consecutive interpretive paragraphs still arrive after the live beat has already dramatized the shift.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps stopping to explain why Eli feels real and why Lena is sliding toward him after the concrete beat has already landed. That repeated interpretation makes the seduction legible, but it also softens scene pressure and leaves the second half more argued than dangerous.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or cut the thesis-style explanation between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:245, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:297 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:299, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:412, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:449 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:477, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:541 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:547. Let at least two of those turns land through consequence instead: the repaired earbud working, the paused Hinge profile, the delayed rush file, or the earlier alarm.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the moment at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:678 still lands through this single earned hesitation beat and the immediate exchange does not add a second similar 'almost' construction. Fail if the line is flattened into generic reluctance or multiplied into a repeated tic nearby.
findings.problem: The novel uses an 'almost [verb]' hesitation construction in 9 chapters. This chapter's line at 678 is the strongest early instance and is the one the book should keep, but it needs to remain singular rather than inaugurating a tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the beat at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:678, but if you revise the surrounding exchange, sharpen the specific contrast between Eli's practical request and Lena's eroticized reception of it instead of adding another 'almost' suppression beat in the same scene.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
